name: Crawlee (Apify Web Scraping Framework)
pricing_notes: Open source (Apache 2.0); Apify Cloud optional for proxy/scaling

auth.notes: Self-hosted: no auth; Apify Cloud: API key for proxy/deployment

performance.notes: Network-bound; concurrent crawling with configurable concurrency

agent_readiness.notes: TypeScript-first web scraping/crawling framework from Apify. Multiple crawler types: CheerioCrawler (fast HTML), PlaywrightCrawler (JS rendering), PuppeteerCrawler, BasicCrawler. Auto request queuing. Fingerprint spoofing for anti-bot bypass. Data storage abstractions (KeyValueStore, Dataset, RequestQueue). Proxy rotation. Session management. Fingerprinting. EventEmitter pattern. Works standalone or deploys to Apify Cloud. The most complete scraping framework for Node.js.

gotchas: Anti-bot bypass requires proxy configuration (Apify or 3rd party)
Playwright/Puppeteer crawlers much slower than CheerioCrawler
Fingerprint spoofing helps but doesn't guarantee bypass of all anti-bot
Local file storage not suitable for large-scale production (use Apify Cloud)
best_when: Large-scale crawling with request queuing and deduplication
AI data collection pipelines needing robust scraping
avoid_when: Simple HTML scraping (use cheerio or JSDOM directly)
Python-based data pipelines (use Scrapy or crawl4ai)
When robust anti-bot bypass needs commercial solutions
summary: Crawlee is Apify's TypeScript-first web scraping framework. Provides CheerioCrawler, PlaywrightCrawler, and PuppeteerCrawler with auto request queuing, proxy rotation, fingerprint spoofing, and session management. The most complete scraping framework for Node.js. Works standalone or deploys to Apify Cloud for scaling. Best for production-grade web data collection pipelines.
